title: [Aikido] Fix security issue in qs via minor version upgrade from 6.14.0 to 6.14.1

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: Update qs
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relationship: supersedes - already updated qs to 6.14.1 before this PR was opened

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: chore(deps): bump qs from 6.14.1 to 6.14.2 in /scripts/gh-issue-triage

summary: Automated Aikido security bot PR to upgrade qs from 6.14.0 to 6.14.1 to fix CVE-2025-15284 (HIGH severity DoS via bracket notation bypass in array parsing). Changes package.json overrides and pnpm-lock.yaml. Also includes an unrelated downgrade of @upstash/redis from 1.36.2 to 1.36.0.
maintainerNotes: This PR should be closed. The qs upgrade to 6.14.1 was already merged in PR #12506 on 2026-02-01, nine days before this PR was opened. The lockfile currently has qs at a newer version and @upstash/redis at 1.36.4. This PR has merge conflicts and would actually downgrade @upstash/redis to 1.36.0. CI is failing across the board. The security issue (CVE-2025-15284) has already been addressed.
